metadata.rationale: 该样本把REAL ID政策夸大并改写成“无星标证件几乎全面作废、护照也无效”的排他性规则，核心结论与可核实政策不符。配图又通过多张AI生成的“REAL ID ONLY”现场图，把原本有限、特定场景下的身份证件要求包装成全国多场景同步严查的既成事实，并将州政府证件示意图错当成机场现场重点核验样式，构成文本虚构、合成视觉证据和图文语义、语境双重不一致。

best_trajectory.observation:

Travelers who do not have a REAL ID-compliant ID by the May 7, 2025, deadline will need another form of acceptable identification, such as a U.S. passport or a military ID, to pass through security.
REAL ID | Transportation Security Administration - TSA: Enforcement began May 7, 2025. Are You Travel Ready? TSA ConfirmID Alert. TSA ConfirmID Alert: Travelers without an acceptable form of ID must pay a $45 fee. (https://www.tsa.gov/realid)
REAL ID Required for U.S. Travelers beginning May 7, 2025: As of May 7, 2025, US travelers will need to present a REAL ID compliant license/ID or another acceptable form of identification to board commercial flights. Don't forget! The REAL ID Act is officially in full effect as of May 7 ...: Federal agencies, including the TSA, will begin REAL ID enforcement on the deadline, which is May 7, 2025. Starting that day, only state-issued ... (https://www.facebook.com/SATairport/posts/dont-forget-the-real-id-act-is-officially-in-full-effect-as-of-may-7-2025-you-wi/1127825336057106/)
REAL ID Requirements Begin May 7th, 2025 - Texas State Law Library: REAL ID Requirements Begin May 7th, 2025 ... Starting May 7th, 2025, federal law requires all state IDs to adhere to certain minimum standards. (https://www.sll.texas.gov/spotlight/2025/03/real-id-requirements-begin-may-7th-2025/)
REAL ID DEADLINE BEGINS IN TWO MONTHS REAL ... - Facebook: Starting May 7, 2025, all U.S. travelers aged 18 and older will be required to present a REAL ID-compliant driver's license or another ... (https://www.facebook.com/MontgomeryCoNY/posts/real-id-deadline-begins-in-two-monthsreal-id-requirements-begin-may-7-2025-to-fl/1039881924852782/)

best_trajectory.thought: Based on the previous Google search results which confirmed the May 7, 2025 enforcement date and the presence of the star on REAL ID cards, and the image explicitly showing this exact deadline, the news text is factually accurate. I have sufficient evidence to conclude this topic is TEXT_SUPPORT.

To verify the veracity of the news text, I need to first analyze the visual content of the image. I should call the image detection tool to retrieve the relevant scene details, focusing on the TSA agent, the passengers, the sign details, and the ID verification process.
best_trajectory.observation:
- **明显的后期处理痕迹**：多位人物的脸部被统一用方块马赛克遮挡，边缘较硬、覆盖一致，属于典型的隐私打码编辑，并非现场自然效果。  
- **画面合成/生成迹象不明显**：整体光线方向一致（室内顶光），人物与背景的景深、清晰度、噪点风格协调；各物体遮挡关系自然（前景工作人员、柜台设备、后方排队人群）。未见常见AI生成问题（手指畸形、文字乱码、重复纹理等）。  
- **文字与标牌可信度**：大屏标牌“REAL ID REQUIRED / BEGINNING MAY 7, 2025 / TSA.gov/REAL-ID”排版规整、透视正确、边缘无异常重影；“TSA”“Homeland Security”等标识清晰，像真实摄影中的宣传屏。  
- **可能的“摆拍/宣传照”风格**：构图干净、主体明确（TSA人员与旅客），大屏信息突出，整体更像新闻配图或官方宣传照片，但这不等同于造假。  

结论：图像本身看起来是**真实拍摄照片**，主要编辑是对人脸的**隐私马赛克处理**；未见明显的拼接或AI合成痕迹。
